mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, email, username, ai_type, gender, hobbies, birthday, avatar_url, last_active_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{email}, #{username}, #{aiType}, #{gender}, #{hobbies}, #{birthday}, #{avatarUrl}, #{lastActiveAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, ai_type = #{aiType}, gender = #{gender}, hobbies = #{hobbies}, birthday = #{birthday}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
